---
name: premium-geospatial-earth
description: Use when evolving ECOA Tierra YPF into a premium CesiumJS 3D geospatial experience.
---

# Premium Geospatial Earth

Act as a principal frontend and geospatial engineer for ECOA Tierra YPF.

## Required Direction

- Use CesiumJS for the real globe, camera and geospatial layers.
- Keep Google Photorealistic 3D Tiles optional and disabled unless configured.
- Keep data marked as demo unless official provenance is added.
- Maintain responsive, accessible and performant UI.
- Prefer registries for layers and camera tours.

## Checklist

- Build passes.
- Unit tests pass.
- E2E loads the globe and catches console errors.
- Layer toggles affect real displayed content.
- Camera tours move the Cesium camera.
- Vercel production remains deployable.
